ThingDef.label: FN Five-seveN
ThingDef.description: The FN Five-seven is a semi-automatic pistol designed and manufactured by FN Herstal in Belgium.

ThingDef.label: FN Five-seveN Suppressed
ThingDef.description: The FN Five-seven is a semi-automatic pistol designed and manufactured by FN Herstal in Belgium.

ThingDef.label: UMP45
ThingDef.description: The Heckler and Koch UMP (Universale Maschinenpistole, German for "Universal Machine Pistol") is a submachine gun developed and manufactured by Heckler and Koch. Heckler and Koch developed the UMP as a lighter and cheaper successor to the MP5, though both remain in production.

ThingDef.label: UMP45
ThingDef.description: The Heckler and Koch UMP (Universale Maschinenpistole, German for "Universal Machine Pistol") is a submachine gun developed and manufactured by Heckler and Koch. Heckler and Koch developed the UMP as a lighter and cheaper successor to the MP5, though both remain in production.

ThingDef.label: M4A1 Carbine
ThingDef.description: The M4 carbine is an assault rifle developed in the United States during the 1980s. It is a shortened version of the M16A2 assault rifle.

ThingDef.label: M4A1 USASOC-I
ThingDef.description: The M4 carbine is an assault rifle developed in the United States during the 1980s. It is a shortened version of the M16A2 assault rifle.

ThingDef.label: M4A1 SOPMOD II
ThingDef.description: The M4 carbine is an assault rifle developed in the United States during the 1980s. It is a shortened version of the M16A2 assault rifle.

ThingDef.label: M4AX
ThingDef.description: The M4AX is something something bla bla bla, do you guys even read this???

ThingDef.label: HK416
ThingDef.description: The HK416 is an assault rifle chambered for the 5.56x45mm NATO cartridge, designed and manufactured by the German company Heckler and Koch.

ThingDef.label: HK416 Assault
ThingDef.description: This HK416 is all you need.

ThingDef.label: HK416 Tactical
ThingDef.description: The HK416 is an assault rifle chambered for the 5.56x45mm NATO cartridge, designed and manufactured by the German company Heckler and Koch.

ThingDef.label: MDR Tactical
ThingDef.description: The MDR is a bullpup semi-automatic rifles designed by Desert Tech (formerly Desert Tactical Arms) in 2014.

ThingDef.label: MDR Suppressed
ThingDef.description: The MDR is a bullpup semi-automatic rifles designed by Desert Tech (formerly Desert Tactical Arms) in 2014.
